blockingIssues.description: Canonical follow-up reads still use CatalogProductDto without `variantGroupId` or `productFamilyName`, so GET /api/v1/catalog/products and GET /api/v1/catalog/products/{productId} cannot return the persisted family/group linkage required by VAL-PRODUCT-009.

AccountingCatalogControllerIdempotencyHeaderTest still constructs AccountingCatalogController and calls importCatalog even though AccountingCatalogController was reduced to an empty private shell, leaving stale test source behind. A clean `mvn clean test-compile -DskipTests` now fails on those missing constructor/method references.

`.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md` still lists stale catalog request-field bullets (`sizeLabel`, `basePrice`, `minSellingPrice`, `metadata`) that do not match the surviving CatalogProductRequest contract, so contract cleanup remains incomplete.

The cleanup packet widened scope by changing SalesControllerIT and TS_RuntimeInventoryValuationExecutableCoverageTest to repair known pre-existing non-catalog failures that mission guidance explicitly marked out of scope.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that proof-only packet work is valid when runtime behavior already satisfies the assigned assertions and the worker's job is to add or tighten regression evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `catalog-downstream-readiness` passed review, but its worker still recorded a procedure deviation because the skill does not explicitly describe proof-only validation work. The transcript shows the worker followed the expected research/setup flow and added only regression evidence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align Step 4 cleanup expectations with mission feature slicing so workers know when contract-surface cleanup belongs to a later dedicated cleanup feature versus the current feature.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `catalog-public-surface-retirement` review noted the skill requires endpoint inventory, frontend handoff, and README/doc cleanup in the same feature, while this mission assigns that work to `catalog-contract-cleanup-and-proof` in features.json.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: State explicitly that doc/OpenAPI/handoff updates named in a feature description or validation contract are in-scope even under default instructions that otherwise discourage documentation edits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `catalog-canonical-product-contract` worker recorded a formal deviation after leaving packet docs/library files untouched because it interpreted the default 'do not update docs unless asked' guidance as conflicting with the packet's required contract-surface cleanup.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a new shared services.yaml command to force clean test compilation whenever controller APIs are removed.
rejectedObservations.reason: Not applied during this validation run because the scrutiny packet already captured direct clean-compile evidence for the stale test-source failure, and changing shared validator commands would expand scope beyond reporting the milestone's current findings.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document `erp-domain/openapi.json` as shared knowledge because the cleanup worker copied the repo-root snapshot there manually.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as ambiguous for now because the review evidence shows a manual synchronization step, but it does not establish whether the secondary snapshot is an enduring contract requirement or a one-off packet tactic.
